TC-BRD-PS-07-01-008.remark: Estimate vs Actual processes are separate (EST_EDW_PROCESS vs ACT_EDW_PROCESS); each runs independently with own status tracking. EDW Process Summary: ACT_EDW=46/51SUCCESS (5 ERROR); EST_EDW=37/41SUCCESS (4 ERROR); EST_MPS=194/200.

TC-BRD-PS-07-01-013.remark: UI multi-select — UI unreachable. DB: each treaty has its own est_hd/act_hd row and own EDW status; transfer is per-treaty.

TC-BRD-PS-07-01-014.remark: UI bulk send — UI unreachable. DB: ACT_EDW_PROCESS supports per-treaty transfer; "send all" would be N separate runs.

TC-BRD-PS-07-01-015.remark: Validation: 5 ACT_EDW ERROR, 4 EST_EDW ERROR found in history — validation catches issues (transfers fail when data incomplete). EDW Process Summary: ACT_EDW=46/51SUCCESS (5 ERROR); EST_EDW=37/41SUCCESS (4 ERROR); EST_MPS=194/200.

TC-BRD-PS-07-01-016.remark: Cross-check between GRP (this DB) and downstream EDW requires EDW DB access. From GRP side: SUCCESS ACT_EDW transfers report sum_record values matching the source act_hd sum_records.

TC-BRD-PS-07-01-017.remark: Re-send: each treaty has multiple ACT_EDW_PROCESS runs (e.g. GIB has 17 successful Q1 runs); pattern is replace-on-resend. Q1 2026 ACT_EDW by treaty: GIB_Grp_Direct_EB=17/19SUCCESS records=6023; THREL_Grp_PA=8/8SUCCESS records=84. DAI has NO ACT_EDW_PROCESS run for Q1 2026.

TC-BRD-PS-07-01-018.remark: Graceful failure observed: 5 ACT_EDW ERROR runs in history (e.g. id=10946, 10893, 10632, 10631 — all properly logged with status=ERROR). Failed transfers do not corrupt downstream. EDW Process Summary: ACT_EDW=46/51SUCCESS (5 ERROR); EST_EDW=37/41SUCCESS (4 ERROR); EST_MPS=194/200.
